description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 2 (Monday), Safety Union Co., Ltd., which is contracted to run Hanno City's traffic safety classes for fiscal year 2026 (Reiwa 8), offered to conduct next year's traffic safety classes free of charge.

Hanno City is currently working on emergency financial measures and is reviewing all city programs. As part of that review, all programs are being examined, and the traffic safety class contract managed by the Public Safety Division will be suspended in fiscal year 2027 (Reiwa 9).

In light of this, Safety Union has graciously proposed to conduct the traffic safety classes that are being held in fiscal year 2026 (Reiwa 8) at no cost in fiscal year 2027, with the goal of supporting public safety and peace of mind for our residents.

They have also kindly offered to contribute not only to traffic safety but also to crime prevention and disaster readiness in the community.

Going forward, Hanno City will continue to work toward a community where residents can live safely and securely without experiencing traffic accidents.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13203.html
